title: ascyrum hypericoides var. angustifolium
intro: Ascyrum hypericoides var. angustifolium, also known as a lesser-known variety of the St. John's Wort plant, is a flowering plant that is native to Eastern North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Ascyrum hypericoidium include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, as well as its potential to have antidepressant and antiviral effects. Herbal preparations of Ascyrum hypericoides var. angustifolium can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
